picks.reasoning: This Champions League semi-final first leg at the Metropolitano is set to be a cagey affair. Atlético's defensive solidity at home, combined with Arsenal's tactical discipline in big away games, points towards a stalemate. The loss of Pablo Barrios for Atlético may reduce their creative spark, further increasing the likelihood of a low-scoring draw. At 3.20, the draw offers substantial value with a 6.7% edge.
